headline: Clear calendar and no inbound fires — use today to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), your only active ticket.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so tomorrow's brief has real data
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the 'Generated evaluations - no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: Evals are a key 26.4+ deliverable tied to the Agents Big Rock; no due date set means it could slip silently. Empty calendar = best day to get this done.

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock bi-weekly TR page for latest evals and agent updates to inform your design doc
must_make_progress.why: The Confluence page lists evals as a key demo/deliverable area; aligning your doc to current team direction avoids rework

must_communicate_with.about: Align on scope and acceptance criteria for AE-1079 no-ground-truth design; confirm any open questions before you write

must_communicate_with.person_or_team: IT / DevOps (or whoever manages Salesforce & Snowflake creds)
must_communicate_with.about: Salesforce INVALID_LOGIN and Snowflake empty-password errors blocking your dashboards

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — you have zero visibility into open customer escalations.
Snowflake metrics connection is down (empty password) — no product telemetry or funnel data available.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of it drifting given it supports a key 26.4+ deliverable (evals). Consider setting a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged 'Risk Yellow' in the Big Rock TR — monitor for any spillover into your evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations resolved or decisions made yet today; primary opportunity is unblocking observability by fixing Salesforce/Snowflake creds and advancing the evals design doc that underpins 26.4 agent quality.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals) is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work available today.

slack_summary: Your calendar is completely clear today — best opportunity to make serious headway on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc), your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Urgent housekeeping: both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and product metrics — get creds fixed. Zero meetings today.
